title: Hydro Upgrade
description: Mod that make swimming more immersive
body:
This mod aim to change minecraft default swimming mechanic to more realistic one. **Hydro Upgrade** add new **buoyancy** system that adjust with player's air and change the way player can move around above water.

## Feature
- Limit how height player can swim above water surface. (Not limit when water too shallow or too close to land)
- Simple Buoyancy system.
- Limit ascending and descending swimming speed.
- Water pressure.

## Screen Shot
Limit how far above surface player can swim (Holding spacebar)
![Limit how far above surface player can swim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddb50a118dc6cf95ed9e1d1f59c9f2d1dbdb4901.png)
